unit.title: Identity, Origin, And Family Basics
unit.communicationGoal: Say where you are from, name one or two family members, state a simple relationship, and introduce yourself and a family member from a short prompt.
pronunciationFocus: The ү in үй-бүлө is a front rounded vowel, not a plain u
Hear the -тен suffix in Бишкектенмин as one flowing ending
Менин runs quickly before the next word; do not pause between them
